decisions.detail: HAO buzzing on r/pennystocks but not research-vetted
CAI: critic approve (medium): Only momentum fails; insider-driven score with clean dilution history, no insider selling, legitimate catalyst (product launch), no pump signs.
NTSK: critic approve (high): Strong composite score, 7/7 confluence, positive insider buy catalyst confirmed by headlines; no dilution or pump signs.
WRAP failed confluence: 5/7 pass | momentum | news_ok | options_flow | rsi_ok | no_insider_selling | FAIL: tight_spread,clean_dilution_history | VETO: spread 15.25% > 3.0%
UUUU: critic approve (medium): No pump pattern or missed dilution risk; dilution history already reflected in failed check, not overlooked. Momentum miss alone isn't veto-worthy.
